● Live Boss Raids

Every coin spawns as a boss — launched on SlimeWire or not. Rally your X & Telegram crew to raid it, climb the leaderboard, and ape the survivors. Got a coin? Put it on the board in 5 seconds.

Drop your token's contract address — it goes live as a boss for the whole swamp to raid. Rally your crew.

🚀 Launch = become a boss

Launch your coin on SlimeWire and it goes live here as a raid boss — instant exposure, crew raids, share cards, and a creature in The Swamp.
